LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF YOSHABEL CLEMENTS' MOTION FOR APPROVAL OF FILING NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION (REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR TO HAVE AN ENFORCEABLE INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT PROPERTY. MOREOVER, THE ORDER REQUESTED WOULD BE CONTRARY TO THE COURT'S ORDER OF AUGUST 31, 2007 ISSUED BY JUDGE DONDERO AND THE RECEIVERSHIP. ANY RELIEF FROM THOSE ORDERS MUST BE BROUGHT BEFORE JUDGE DONDERO. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
